attributes.description: Alerts when watch count exceeds 10,000. High watch counts risk notification storms.
attributes.name: [ZooKeeper OTel] Excessive watch count

investigation_guide.blob:
## ZooKeeper excessive watch count

### What fired
Watch count exceeded 10,000 during the window.

### Why it matters
High watch counts amplify any topology change into a storm of callbacks, potentially overloading the ensemble.

### Triage
1. Inspect clients with the most watches.

### Remediation
- Redesign clients to use fewer targeted watches.

### Tuning
- 10k threshold matches the documented guidance.
